# awscc_workspaces_workspace_ip_group (Resource)

Resource type definition for an IP access control group for Amazon WorkSpaces.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_name` (String) The name of the group.

### Optional

- `group_desc` (String) The description of the group.
- `tags` (Attributes List) The tags for the IP access control group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `user_rules` (Attributes List) The rules for the IP access control group. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--user_rules))

### Read-Only

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IP access control group.
- `group_id` (String) The identifier of the IP access control group.
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) The key of the tag.
- `value` (String) The value of the tag.


<a id="nestedatt--user_rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `user_rules`

Optional:

- `ip_rule` (String) The IP address range, in CIDR notation.
- `rule_desc` (String) The description of the rule.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_workspaces_workspace_ip_group.example
  identity = {
    arn = "arn"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IP access control group

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_workspaces_workspace_ip_group.example
  id = "arn"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_workspaces_workspace_ip_group.example "arn"
```
